data.title: Pacific Health Care Org. reports Q2 2025 financial results, filed Form 10-Q with SEC for quarter ended June 30, 2025.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, Pacific Health Care Organization, Inc. (OTCQB: PFHO) submitted its quarterly report on Form 10-Q to the Securities and Exchange Commission, revealing the financial performance for the quarter ending on June 30, 2025.

data.title: Coinbase's Q2 earnings: $1.5B revenue, 40% drop in trading volume, missed EPS, $9.3B in USDC, and $1.8B in crypto assets.
data.description: Coinbase Global (NASDAQ: COIN) released its second-quarter financial results, revealing a revenue of $1.5 billion, a 26% decrease from the previous quarter. This fell short of the estimated $1.69 billion. Transaction revenue was $764 million, down 39%, while subscription and services revenue stood at $656 million, a 6% drop. Trading volume also decreased by 40% to $237 billion. Both consumer and institutional transaction revenue experienced a year-over-year decline, with crypto spot volume falling by 31% globally and 32% in the U.S. The company closed the quarter with $9.3 billion in USDC and $1.8 billion in crypto assets. Adjusted earnings... You can find the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: iMemories sold to Ancestry, a Blackstone company. Advised by JEGI CLARITY + LEONIS. 3rd transaction for JEGI CLARITY + LEONIS.
data.description: On July 31, 2025, iMemories, with the counsel of JEGI CLARITY + LEONIS and supported by Greens Farms Capital and Landon Capital Partners, was acquired by Ancestry, a Blackstone portfolio company. Significantly, this acquisition represents the third transaction advised by JEGI CLARITY + LEONIS.

data.description: The government has failed to provide a clear legal basis to force pharmaceutical companies to lower their prices.

data.title: Coherus Oncology will report Q2 2025 financial results on August 7, 2025 through a conference call at 5:00 p.m. EDT.
data.description: In Redwood City, California, on July 31, 2025, Coherus Oncology, Inc. (Nasdaq: CHRS) disclosed the upcoming release of its second quarter 2025 financial results after the market closes on Thursday, August 7, 2025. A conference call and webcast will be led by Coherus’ management team at 5:00 p.m. EDT on August 7, 2025, to delve into the financial outcomes and deliver a comprehensive business overview.
Mercer International Inc. announces Q2 2025 earnings.

data.title: Reddit's Q2 earnings: Revenue beats at $499.6M, EPS beats at 48 cents per share. 78% revenue growth with DAUq up by 21%.
data.description: Reddit Inc, listed as RDDT on NYSE, released their Q2 financial results after trading hours, showing positive numbers. The second-quarter revenue stood at $499.6 million, surpassing the anticipated $424.73 million. Earnings for the quarter were 48 cents per share, exceeding the projected 19 cents per share. This represented a 78% increase in total revenue from the previous year, attributed to a 21% year-over-year surge in daily active unique users (DAUq). RDDT stock experienced an upward trend following the announcement. For more details, the full report can be found on Benzinga.com.
Lawmaker Tuberville reveals recent stock trades, including KEY, PARA, VZ, RF, UAA, and 10 others.

data.title: Huntsman Corp (NYSE: HUN) declared $0.25 per share cash dividend on common stock, payable on Sep 30, 2025, to stockholders of record as of Sep 15.
data.description: In The Woodlands, Texas, on July 31, 2025, Huntsman Corporation (NYSE: HUN) revealed a $0.25 per share cash dividend on its common stock. This dividend will be issued on September 30, 2025, to stockholders who are recorded as of September 15.

data.title: Apple exceeded June-quarter targets with strong iPhone and services sales, causing stock to rise. Wall Street impressed.
data.description: Apple exceeded expectations for its fiscal third quarter, surpassing Wall Street's projections due to robust sales in both iPhone and services sectors. As a result, Apple's stock price experienced an increase.
